title: Crop tool: Ratio/Free + divisible-by round-up; Resize default divisible=16
description: Rework the Crop tool's Resolution Type. Replace the current 4-way family (SDXL/FLUX/SOCIAL/FREE) with TWO options: RATIO and FREE. RATIO uses the same orientation toggle + ratio-row UI as SDXL/FLUX today, but a NEW pure-aspect table (label + ratio float only, NO resolutions) that merges all existing ratios plus cinema ratios (e.g. 21:9, 2.39:1). The user drags a ratio-locked crop box; whatever pixels are selected become the output. Add a 'Divisible by' number input (default 16) directly above the Apply button, applied to the SELECTED output pixels (both W and H). Round-up rule: round each dim UP to the next multiple of N; if that exceeds the source dimension, round DOWN to the previous multiple instead (never invent pixels). Applies to both image AND video crop-apply paths. SEPARATE change in same card: change the Resize tool's default divisible_by from 1 to 16 (image + video modes).
